scope_boundary: Public ASI-side Circle consumer-gate fixture only. The gate validates one pinned `CC-AI-CONTRACT-ROPE-001` rope receipt boundary by digest, theorem IDs, deterministic fields, and four expected-invalid downstream-overclaim controls. It does not rerun Circle Lean in this repository, vendor a public Circle contract pack, prove deployed proof-contract transport, measure model quality, or validate transfer, context-length, memory-scaling, speed, safety, or ASI claims.
transition_reason: The Circle consumer gate is useful because it makes a prior external Circle receipt consumable by this repository through a public fixture, deterministic digest checks, theorem-ID requirements, and mutation controls for digest mismatch, missing theorem IDs, stale contract status, and unsupported transfer-claim use. It remains a consumer-gate wrapper around one prior receipt, not a fresh Circle replay or transport implementation, so it blocks promotion for proof-contract transport, model-quality, context-length, speed, memory-scaling, transfer, safety, ASI, or chapter-core claims.
required_artifacts: fresh public Circle replay or archived public contract pack
repository-owned command that reruns the relevant Circle proof target or verifies an archived replay bundle
proof-contract transport implementation or consumer integration trace
workload, baseline, metric, and report for any downstream model-quality, context-length, transfer, speed, or memory-scaling claim
accepted evidence-transition record for any narrowed upward support movement
negative_results: missing required theorem ID mutation is rejected
stale contract fingerprint status mutation is rejected
fresh Circle replay in this repository remains unclaimed
no chapter core claim is promoted
downgrade_triggers: consumer gate described as a fresh Circle replay
support-state promotion without a separate accepted upward transition
promotion_burden: Move above argument only for a narrowed Circle consumer-gate or proof-contract transport claim after a fresh public Circle replay or archived public contract pack, repository-owned replay/verification command, downstream consumer integration evidence, workload/baseline metrics for any model-facing claim, and independent review are recorded with a separate accepted upward transition.
limitations: depends on a prior external Circle receipt rather than rerunning Circle Lean here
no vendored public Circle contract pack
no model workload, context-length, speed, memory-scaling, transfer, or safety measurement
does not promote any chapter core claim
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; not an independent Circle Calculus, proof-contract transport, model-quality, benchmark, transfer, source-interpretation, or external safety audit
acceptance_blockers: no fresh public Circle replay inside this repository
no archived public Circle contract pack
no downstream workload or baseline evidence
non_claims: does not promote Circle public consumer-gate evidence above argument
does not prove deployed proof-contract transport, model quality, reasoning ability, context length, speed, memory scaling, deployment safety, transfer, benchmark performance, or ASI
does not create an upward support-state transition
does not promote the Circle Calculus chapter core claim
